summary: Matched sysdolphin/baselib/initialize.c by replacing the remaining initialize.s assembly object with C, moving HSD initialization, XFB/FIFO allocation, heap setup, render-pass helpers, object-allocation stats, and init-parameter handling into source. The PR also propagated newly identified HSD and Dolphin/GX names through headers and existing asm callsites, letting game main call typed HSD_SetInitParameter, HSD_AllocateFIFO, GXInit, and HSD_GXSetFifoObj instead of anonymous func_* symbols.
what_changed: Deleted asm/sysdolphin/baselib/initialize.s, an 868-line assembly file, and removed its object from obj_files.mk so src/sysdolphin/baselib/initialize.c owns the matched code.
Converted HSD_InitComponent from an inline asm/NON_MATCHING split into C, with local static FrameBuffer and other initialize.c state replacing extern declarations.

Implemented or matched HSD_AllocateXFB, HSD_AllocateFIFO, HSD_GXInit, HSD_OSInit, HSD_GetHeap, HSD_SetHeap, HSD_GetNextArena, HSD_CreateMainHeap, HSD_GetCurrentRenderPass, HSD_StartRender, func_803755A8, HSD_ObjInit, HSD_ObjDumpStat, and HSD_SetInitParameter in initialize.c.

Added initialize.h definitions for HSD_DEFAULT_FIFO_SIZE, HSD_DEFAULT_XFB_MAX_NUM, HSD_DEFAULT_AUDIO_SIZE, HSD_MemReport padding, HSD_InitParam, and declarations for the newly matched HSD initialization APIs.
Updated gmmain.c to use HSD_SetInitParameter with named HSD_INIT_* enum values, GXInit, HSD_AllocateFIFO, and HSD_GXSetFifoObj instead of raw func_803756F8/func_8033A780/func_80375194 call patterns.
Renamed several known Dolphin GX functions in asm and headers, including GXInit, GXInitLightAttn, GXInitLightPos, GXInitLightDir, GXSetPixelFmt, and GXSetFieldMode.
Renamed HSD callsites in existing asm to HSD_CreateMainHeap, HSD_SetHeap, HSD_GetNextArena, HSD_StartRender, HSD_ObjDumpStat, and HSD_GetCurrentRenderPass.
Added HSD_RenderPass enum to video.h and used it for HSD_StartRender/HSD_GetCurrentRenderPass.
Extended objalloc.h with HSD_ObjAllocInfo plus inline HSD_ObjAllocUsed, HSD_ObjAllocFree, and HSD_ObjAllocPeak helpers used by HSD_ObjDumpStat.
Added small dependency declarations/includes needed by initialize.c, such as mtx.h for HSD_VecGetAllocData/HSD_MtxGetAllocData and forget-memory prototypes in displayfunc.h and robj.h.
smart_moves: Made previously extern state static inside initialize.c, especially FrameBuffer, which the diff explicitly notes was needed for HSD_InitComponent to match.
Matched a full assembly object at once and then removed the parallel asm object from obj_files.mk, avoiding duplicate text and making future work build against the C implementation.
Improved cross-file readability by renaming anonymous callsites to SDK/HSD-style names before or while matching initialize.c; this clarified gmmain.c initialization flow and heap/render callsites.
Used typed enums and constants for HSD initialization parameters instead of magic integers in gmmain.c, preserving behavior while documenting the parameter protocol.
Encoded render-pass state as HSD_RenderPass and routed render startup through HSD_StartRender, making the pixel-format and field-mode setup discoverable from source.
Captured object allocation statistics through a table of getData callbacks and inline accessors, which mirrors the decompiled pattern while reducing repeated field access boilerplate.
Preserved a matching-specific idiom in func_803755A8 with an intentionally ineffective comparison, explicitly commented as needed to force the generated comparison.
decomp_lessons: For files with private globals, matching may require moving tentative externs into the C file as static variables so address generation and section placement match the original object.
When replacing an asm object, update obj_files.mk in the same PR; leaving both src and asm objects can hide duplicate-symbol or ordering problems.
Known SDK functions should be named early because the improved prototypes and call labels can simplify matching surrounding HSD code.
Game initialization code becomes much easier to verify when magic selector calls are lifted into an enum-backed varargs API such as HSD_SetInitParameter(HSD_INIT_*, ...).
Header work is part of matching: this PR needed GX, OS memory, HSD render-pass, object-allocation, and forget-memory declarations for the matched C to compile cleanly.

Small non-obvious source constructs may be necessary for exact codegen; the diff's comment in func_803755A8 is evidence that even a comparison with no assignment can be intentionally retained for matching.
Preserve original memory alignment behavior with OSRoundUp32B/OSRoundDown32B and arena pointer updates when decompiling allocation routines; these details are central to matching initialization code.
naming_conventions: HSD public functions use HSD_* Pascal-like subsystem names, e.g. HSD_AllocateXFB, HSD_AllocateFIFO, HSD_StartRender, HSD_CreateMainHeap.
HSD enum types use HSD_* names and enum constants use all-caps prefix groups, e.g. HSD_InitParam with HSD_INIT_FIFO_SIZE and HSD_RenderPass with HSD_RP_SCREEN.
Dolphin GX SDK functions are named GX*, e.g. GXInit, GXSetPixelFmt, GXSetFieldMode, GXInitLightPos.
Private initialize.c state was made lower_snake_case or static anonymous state where evidence exists, e.g. current_render_pass, current_heap, current_pix_fmt, iparam_fifo_size.
Object allocation names in HSD_ObjDumpStat are short lowercase strings matching allocator families: aobj, fobj, id, slist, dlist, vec, mtx, robj, rval, shadow, render, chan, tevreg.
Forget-memory internal hooks keep leading-underscore HSD naming, e.g. _HSD_DispForgetMemory and _HSD_RObjForgetMemory.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Deleted initialize.s after producing matching C and removed $(BUILD_DIR)/asm/sysdolphin/baselib/initialize.s.o from TEXT_O_FILES.
Replaced inline asm HSD_InitComponent with C once FrameBuffer and related state were declared in the same source file.
Renamed branch-and-link labels in existing asm without changing instructions, improving symbol knowledge while preserving binary behavior.
Used known GX prototypes in include/functions.h/gxtypes.h to allow calls like GXInitLightAttn and GXSetPixelFmt from C.
Retained a commented matching artifact in func_803755A8: an otherwise no-op comparison is used to force a comparison in generated code.
Used static local arrays/tables, such as the forget-memory callback table and HSD_ObjDumpStat allocator table, to express original data-driven loops in C.
Matched arena/FIFO/XFB allocation with explicit 32-byte rounding and OS arena updates, matching common PowerPC codegen patterns around OSGetArenaLo/Hi and OSSetArenaLo.
review_feedback: No issue comments or review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
The slice reports one review, but no review body or actionable feedback was included, so reviewer intent cannot be inferred.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that clean up static function declarations in initialize.h or move private HSD_DVDInit/HSD_GXInit/HSD_OSInit out of public headers.
Search for later renames of func_803755A8 and whether the forced comparison was eventually explained or eliminated.
Search for follow-up PRs matching sysdolphin/baselib/video.c or displayfunc.c using HSD_RenderPass and HSD_StartRender.
Search for PRs that replace remaining func_8033E11C, func_8033E144, func_80361FC4, or func_80366B64 calls used by HSD_GXInit.
Check later heap/lbheap work for reuse of HSD_CreateMainHeap, HSD_SetHeap, and HSD_GetNextArena declarations.
